title.en: COFEPRIS Alert: Risk of Collecting and Consuming Wild Mushrooms
title.zh: COFEPRIS警示：采集和食用野生蘑菇的风险

summary.en: COFEPRIS has issued a safety alert warning about the severe health risks of collecting and consuming wild mushrooms, including poisoning and death. The general public, especially those who forage in rural areas, are affected. The alert advises against consuming wild mushrooms unless identified by experts, and to only eat mushrooms from safe commercial sources. Immediate medical attention is urged if ingestion and symptoms occur.
summary.zh: COFEPRIS发布安全警示，警告采集和食用野生蘑菇存在严重健康风险，可能导致中毒甚至死亡。受影响群体包括公众，尤其是农村地区有采摘习惯的人群。警示建议除非经专家鉴定，否则不要食用野生蘑菇，并仅食用来源安全的商业蘑菇。若误食并出现症状，应立即就医。

title.en: COFEPRIS Requests Stakeholders to Complete Satisfaction Survey on Sanitary Alerts Program
title.zh: COFEPRIS 邀请利益相关方参与卫生警报项目满意度调查

summary.en: COFEPRIS has published a call for stakeholders to answer a satisfaction survey regarding its sanitary alerts program. This initiative aims to gather user feedback on the effectiveness and accessibility of safety communications. There are no new safety alerts or regulatory changes associated with this item; it is solely a feedback mechanism. Interested parties can access the survey via the provided link.
summary.zh: COFEPRIS 发布了一项呼吁，邀请利益相关方就其卫生警报项目填写满意度调查。此举旨在收集用户对安全沟通有效性和可及性的反馈。此项目不涉及新的安全警报或法规变更，仅为反馈机制。相关方可透过提供的链接参与调查。

title.en: COFEPRIS Alert: Users Instructed to Print the Entire Safety Alert Page
title.zh: COFEPRIS警示：用户须打印完整安全警示页面

summary.en: COFEPRIS has issued an alert titled 'Print the complete page' on its safety notices page. This appears to be a reminder to regulated entities, including medical device companies, that when retrieving safety alerts from the official website, they must print the entire page to ensure all critical information, including headers and disclaimers, is captured for their records. This may impact how companies document official communications for compliance purposes.
summary.zh: COFEPRIS在其安全警示页面发布了题为“打印完整页面”的警示。该警示提醒包括医疗器械公司在内的受监管实体，在从官网获取安全警示时，必须打印整个页面，以确保包括标题和免责声明在内的所有关键信息均被完整记录。此举可能影响企业为合规目的正式通信的存档方式。
